title: Sort inbox from the oldest to newest one
excerpt: Hi guys, I have a feature request regarding monday’s dashboard inbox since it hasnt a filter to sort inbox from oldest to newest. It would be good to have it since sometimes we got a lot of inbox and we want to reply it …

posts.author: jonathan.mahardifa (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys, I have a feature request regarding monday’s dashboard inbox since it hasnt a filter to sort inbox from oldest to newest. It would be good to have it since sometimes we got a lot of inbox and we want to reply it from the oldest one and sometimes we miss the old one. thank you
